headline: How much to invest in Coca-Cola for $1,000 annual dividends in 2026
summary: Passive income is one of the most talked-about goals in personal finance. And for good reason. Getting paid to hold a stock, without lifting a finger, is a concept that resonates with both new and seasoned investors. Coca-Cola is one of the most popular stocks for that exact purpose. headline: VIG Returned 223% Over 10 Years and Still Costs Almost Nothing
summary: A 1.5% yield sounds unimpressive until you realize the dividend check doubles roughly every seven years. That is the premise behind the Vanguard Dividend Appreciation ETF (NYSEARCA:VIG): skip the high-yield traps and own companies that raise their dividends year after year, compounding income alongside capital appreciation. What VIG Is Actually Trying to Do VIG tracks ... VIG Returned 223% Over 10 Years and Still Costs Almost Nothing

headline: Coca-Cola Expands Fairlife And Bottler Investments To Broaden Earnings Mix
summary: Coca-Cola is expanding investment in Fairlife milk production in the US with new lines and facilities. Arca Continental, one of Coca-Cola's largest bottlers, is celebrating its 100th anniversary with record investments in operations, digital initiatives, and new beverage categories. The developments highlight Coca-Cola's focus on value added dairy and broader beverage categories beyond its core soft drink portfolio. For investors watching Coca-Cola, NYSE:KO, the latest moves around Fairlife...
